_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in using tools, techniques, and procedures to exploit a target.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI systems, attack surface analysis, and control gap identification.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-010 (AI, cosine: 0.551), AG-S-005 (AG, cosine: 0.520).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.496). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [exploit, procedures, target, techniques, tools, using] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.888 (P=0.904, R=0.872). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:66.5%, C:33.3%). No dominant classification for "Skill in using tools, techniques, and procedures to exploit a target." vs "Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI sy" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.564 > STS 0.496 (gap +0.068). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [exploit, procedures, target, techniques, tools, using]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control].

signals.detail: STS 0.496 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
